strategies.name: A ramp take
strategies.description: Take A ramp and build toward site.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: take A ramp smoke bridge flash over

meta.purpose: Secure the key route into A with manageable utility

strategies.name: Fast A ramp
strategies.description: Hit A quickly through ramp.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: rush A ramp smoke bridge flash over

meta.purpose: Beat defender setup and claim site space early

strategies.name: Mid to A
strategies.description: Use mid pressure to support an A finish.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: mid control then A smoke bridge

meta.purpose: Open A without only relying on ramp
goodWhen: enemy A ramp setup is strong
notes: timing between mid and A matters

strategies.name: B stairs take
strategies.description: Take B stairs before deciding to finish.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Gain safe B access and test defender reaction
goodWhen: A ramp is expensive to fight

strategies.name: Fast B site
strategies.description: Commit to B quickly with a simple smoke.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: rush B stairs smoke CT flash site

meta.purpose: Beat B anchors before they can layer utility

strategies.name: Fake B to A
strategies.description: Show B utility and switch to A.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: [fake] B stairs smoke CT go A ramp

meta.purpose: Pull one rotator from A before the real hit
goodWhen: enemy rotates quickly off B presence
A ramp can still be taken
notes: do not lose players in the fake

strategies.name: Silent A ramp
strategies.description: Walk A ramp and burst late.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: [silent] A ramp walk then swing site smoke bridge

meta.purpose: Catch ramp anchors before full rotate warning

strategies.name: A split ramp mid
strategies.description: Pressure A from ramp and mid.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: 3 A ramp 2 mid go A smoke bridge

meta.purpose: Create two entry timings onto A

strategies.name: Delayed B stairs
strategies.description: Wait and hit B after one minute.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: hide B stairs till 1:00 then go B smoke CT flash site

meta.purpose: Punish CT info pushes and early rotate assumptions
goodWhen: A has shown enough noise earlier

strategies.name: Mid lurk to B
strategies.description: Use mid timing to support a B finish.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: 2 mid 3 B stairs smoke CT go B

meta.purpose: Pin B defenders from more than one angle

strategies.name: A ramp re-hit
strategies.description: Show A ramp, back off, then hit again.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: show A ramp 2 then 5 A ramp smoke bridge go A

meta.purpose: Bait defender utility and punish over-rotation
notes: great after repeated A control rounds

strategies.name: B to mid fake A
strategies.description: Show B and convert through mid toward A.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: show B stairs then mid 2 go A ramp smoke bridge

meta.purpose: Move defenders off A before a split-style finish
notes: fake must be believable but safe
A team should wait for cue

strategies.name: A ramp control
strategies.description: Contest or stabilize A ramp.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Deny free A approach and gather info
notes: do not overpeek after first info

strategies.name: B stairs hold
strategies.description: Stable two-player B defense.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Keep B secure while A fights for ramp
notes: stairs and site roles should be clear

strategies.name: Mid info push
strategies.description: Push mid for information.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Learn whether Ts are leaning A or B

strategies.name: A stack
strategies.description: Gamble extra players on A.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Punish repeated A ramp rounds

strategies.name: B stack
strategies.description: Gamble extra players on B.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Punish repeated B stairs hits

strategies.name: A retake
strategies.description: Delay A and retake together.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Avoid dying into layered bridge/ramp utility

strategies.name: B retake
strategies.description: Delay B and retake with support.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Avoid isolated losses on the cramped B site

strategies.name: Double A ramp
strategies.description: Use two players to secure ramp.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Deny simple ramp control and force Ts elsewhere
goodWhen: enemy keeps taking ramp for free
you have a strong ramp duo

strategies.name: Save crossfire
strategies.description: Compact setup for weak economy.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Protect rifles and force Ts to clear layered angles

strategies.name: A anti-rush
strategies.description: Prepare to stop fast A ramp rounds.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Delay quick ramp floods until rotate help arrives

strategies.name: B anti-rush
strategies.description: Prepare for fast B stairs rounds.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Stop B bursts before Ts can flood the site

strategies.name: Mid hold passive
strategies.description: Watch mid without fully pushing.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Gather safe info and support both sites
